actual_output:
The AC in the apartment is struggling to keep up with the mid-July heat, leaving the air thick and heavy. I’m leaning against the kitchen counter, nursing a glass of ice water that’s already sweating. 

I’m wearing my favorite oversized white t-shirt—the one that’s worn thin enough to be slightly translucent—and nothing else but a pair of tiny black lace panties. No bra, because it’s way too hot for that shit, and I like the way the fabric brushes against my nipples every time I move.

I hear your door open and I don't even bother trying to cover up. I just turn around slowly, letting the hem of the shirt ride up a little higher on my thighs as I take a slow sip of my water, watching you over the rim of the glass.

"God, it's fucking brutal out there, isn't it?" I say, my voice a bit low and raspy from the heat. I let a single ice cube slip into my mouth, crunching it loudly while I look you up and down. "You look like you're melting. Want a drink, or do you just want to stand there and stare at me?"
